title: HOUSING AUTHORITY - 211info
text: HOUSING AUTHORITY OF MALHEUR AND HARNEY COUNTIES HOUSING AUTHORITY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Administers the following housing programs: -Section 8 Housing Choice Voucher Program: As of April 2018, Section 8 is accepting pre-applications for the wait list and has a 12-month wait time -Family Self-Sufficiency Program: Helps Section 8 recipients obtain education and job skills in order to become financially self-sufficient -Housing Choice Voucher Homeownership Program: Helps Section 8 recipients receive assistance toward a monthly mortgage payment -Low-Rent Public Housing Program: Provides federally subsidized rental housing -Farm Labor Housing: Offers housing for active and retired agricultural workers Also fields complaints about Section 8 and public housing programs. 959 Fortner Street Ontario, OR 97914 Eligibility: -Low-income households; applicants from outside Malheur and Harney Counties must reside in Malheur or Harney County for one year before requesting to move to another county. -Farm labor housing is available to domestic agricultural workers including those working on fish and oyster farms and on-farm processing; can be retired and/or disabled from agricultural work; must be a U.S. citizen or permanent resident. Available to laborers that handle any raw materials. Hours: Monday-Thursday 9am-noon and 1pm-5pm Email (541) 889-9661 101 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 889-9661 Main phone (541) 889-6487 FAX Main phone (541) 889-9661 ext 101 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: Copies of birth certificates and Social Security cards for all household members, photo ID for all adults, and a completed pre-application LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Harney and Malheur Counties Services: Case/Care Management * Section 8 Housing Residents Elderly/Disabled Home Rental Listings Housing Complaints * Public Housing Residents Housing Complaints * Section 8 Housing Residents Public Housing Public Housing * Agricultural Laborers Rural Housing Development Section 8 Housing Choice Vouchers Section 8/Rental Assistance Program Rental Listings Subsidized Home Acquisition Subsidized Housing Administrative Organizations If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. HOUSING AUTHORITY OF MALHEUR AND HARNEY COUNTIES
